project_info.name: Turismo que se Sente
project_info.description: An accessible tourism guide mobile app for visually impaired people exploring Natal, RN (Brazil).
project_info.archetype: Custom Accessible Dark Theme (derived from Luxury & Performance elements for high visibility)

brand_primary.description: Purple/Violet derived from the official project logo. Used for primary CTAs and active states.

background.description: Dark Navy background for premium feel while reducing eye strain.

text.description: High contrast white/slate text to ensure readability for low-vision users.

sizes.details: Heading bold 22-26px as per spec, body minimum 16px for readability.

touch_targets.description: Crucial for motor accessibility. Buttons and inputs must be large and easily tappable.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7C3AED] text-white h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1E293B] border-2 border-[#334155] text-white h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.tourist_spot: bg-[#1E293B] rounded-xl border border-[#334155] overflow-hidden flex flex-col
cards.category: bg-[#334155] rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2

inputs.search: h-12 bg-[#0B1120] border-2 border-[#334155] rounded-full px-6 text-white focus:border-[#7C3AED] placeholder:text-slate-400

audio_player.container: bg-[#1E293B] rounded-xl p-6 border border-[#334155] mt-4
audio_player.play_button: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#7C3AED] flex items-center justify-center

accessibility_rules.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AAA contrast ratio against its background. Use Text Shadow over images.
accessibility_rules.screen_reader: Every interactive element MUST have aria-label/accessibilityLabel.
accessibility_rules.testing: All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' (e.g., data-testid='play-audio-button').
accessibility_rules.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Always pair icons with text labels, do not rely on icons alone.

home.header: Logo + Welcome message ('Olá, Explore Natal com a gente').
home.search: Large search bar with voice input icon.
home.categories: Grid of quick-access buttons (Atrações, Rotas, Perto, etc.).
home.featured: Horizontal scroll of cards (Morro do Careca, Forte dos Reis Magos).

spot_detail.hero: Image max 40vh with dark gradient overlay.
spot_detail.action: Massive 'Ouvir Audiodescrição' (Listen to audio) primary button.
spot_detail.info: Detailed description in 16px text with good line height.

audio_experience.layout: Centered large album art/image, Spot Title, Audio controls.
audio_experience.controls: Skip back 10s, Huge Play/Pause, Skip forward 10s. Large seek bar.
audio_experience.transcript: Scrollable text below player for deaf-blind or those who prefer reading.

near_me.layout: List view. Category filters as horizontal pill buttons.
near_me.items: Cards showing Spot Name, Distance (e.g., '1.2 km'), Accessibility rating.

side_menu.layout: Full height drawer/menu. Profile at top.
side_menu.links: Favorites, History, Accessibility Settings, Language, Help.
side_menu.emergency: Red (bg-red-600) Emergency Call Button at the bottom.

logo.description: Brand logo, Purple/Violet with accessibility infinity symbol. Used in Header/Splash screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React Native Expo with NativeWind or pure Tailwind CSS for Web.
Implement the dark navy background (#0B1120) strictly. Do not use generic gray or pure black.
Ensure all touchable elements have at least h-12 (48px) to comply with motor accessibility guidelines.
Use the provided image URLs for the specific tourist spots. Use the logo URL in the Header/Splash.
Implement the audiodescrição (audio description) player screen with prominent, high-contrast controls.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as requested in accessibility_rules.
